changes: New `facility` actions for selling production facilities: `list_for_sale`, `browse_for_sale`, `buy_listing`, `cancel_listing`. Listings stay at one station; you must be docked there to buy or list. Listed facilities keep producing for the seller until they sell.

List your own facility with `facility action=list_for_sale facility_id=… price=…`. Faction officers (ManageFacilities) can list faction-owned facilities by adding `faction=true`; sale proceeds go to faction credits.
`facility action=browse_for_sale` shows what's available at your current station with skill / compatibility hints (e.g. you'll see when a facility needs a fuel bunker to be useful).
Listing fees (1% of price, non-refundable) now go to the local station's manager treasury. Ship-listing fees do too (previously they were destroyed).
Station managers will sometimes buy a listed facility instead of building one from scratch, when the listing price beats the cost of building and they can afford it.
